oilgas.note: Oil & Gas lobbying $154.5M in 2024 (OpenSecrets); industry gave ~$24M direct contributions to 119th Congress members (Yale Climate Connections, Jan 2025), 88% to Republicans

aipac.note: Career AIPAC contributions to current 119th Congress members (direct PAC contributions + independent expenditures, TrackAIPAC-consistent methodology). Source: TrackAIPAC.com + FEC PAC filings, 2021-2026. Auto-refreshed from data/fec.json by scripts/refresh_sector_counts.py.

pharma.note: Pharmaceuticals/Health Products PACs gave $16.05M to federal candidates in 2024 (OpenSecrets); broader Health sector PACs totaled $52.2M

finance.note: Finance/Insurance/Real Estate PACs gave $82.6M to federal candidates in 2024, the largest of any sector (OpenSecrets)

defense.note: UNVERIFIED. FEC career contribution data ($50k+ threshold); OpenSecrets Defense sector 2024

tech.note: UNVERIFIED. Based on OpenSecrets Electronics/Technology sector

superpac.note: Total 2024 outside spending hit a record $4.5B; super PACs specifically spent ~$2.6B (OpenSecrets). Count reflects members who received $1M+ in independent expenditures.

anycorp.note: All members except those who publicly pledge to refuse all corporate PAC money
